name: personal-knowledge
description: Personal knowledge workflows for schedules, bookmarks, diaries, writing, blogging, and learning

interface.shortDescription: Schedules, bookmarks, diaries, writing, blogging, and learning workflows
interface.longDescription: Manage Apple Calendar and Reminders, maintain Pinboard bookmarks, capture and develop personal writing, prepare blog drafts, collect diary material, and generate Anki cards.
defaultPrompt: 把这条灵感记到今天的日记
从 Obsidian 笔记中挑选适合发布的博客
